project.name: NEPU-FAMS 固定资产管理系统
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Dark cyberpunk sci-fi admin console for petroleum university asset management, deep space blue-black base, neon electric blue primary, industrial gold accent, glassmorphism cards with neon borders, particle backgrounds, holographic data visualizations
project.designRead: enterprise admin dashboard / university staff / cyberpunk-sci-fi dark / information-dense / avoid flat/minimal - need rich neon glow and glassmorphism
